data.title: EU Moves Toward Centralized Crypto Oversight as ESMA Poised to Take Control
data.description:
The European Commission is preparing a proposal that would dramatically reshape how cryptocurrency assets are supervised across the European Union. According to early details expected to be formalized in December 2025, the plan would centralize regulatory authority under the European Securities and Markets Authority (ESMA).
source: https://www.ethnews.com/eu-moves-toward-centralized-crypto-oversight-as-esma-poised-to-take-control/

data.title: Everything to know about Trump accounts, and how your child can qualify for $1000-$5000
data.description:
Trump is handing out $1,000 in federal seed money to every newborn in America from 2025 through 2028, as long as parents open a government-approved account tied to the stock market. In 2022, just 58% of American households held stocks or bonds, but the wealthiest 1% owned nearly half the total value of those assets. […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/everything-to-know-about-trump-accounts/

data.title: BRICS Nations China, India and Brazil Dump $29,000,000,000 in US Treasuries in One Month As Standard Chartered Warns ‘Dedollarization Is Real’
data.description:
Three BRICS countries just slashed their US Treasury holdings. New data from the U. S. Treasury International Capital reporting system shows Brazil, China and India cut their US Treasury holdings by $29 billion in September
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/12/04/brics-nations-china-india-and-brazil-dump-29000000000-in-us-treasuries-in-one-month-as-standard-chartered-warns-dedollarization-is-real/

data.title: In wake of crypto’s leverage wipeout, SEC approves ‘SUI-on-steroids’ ETF
data.description:
The SEC approved a 2x leveraged ETF tied to SUI as regulators warn that excessive leverage continues to amplify volatility across crypto markets.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/sec-approves-sui-on-steroids-etf?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Dollar Index Rises Amid Currency Exchange Rate Fluctuations
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, the dollar index, which measures the U.S. dollar against six major currencies, increased by 0.14% to close at 98.99. At the close of the New York foreign exchange market, the exchange rate for the euro was 1.1652 dollars, down from the previous day's 1.1672 dollars. The British pound was exchanged at 1.3339 dollars, slightly lower than the previous day's 1.335 dollars. The dollar was exchanged for 155.03 Japanese yen, a decrease from the previous day's 155.15 yen. Meanwhile, the dollar rose against the Swiss franc, exchanging at 0.8032, up from 0.7994 the previous day. The exchange rate for the Canadian dollar was 1.3953, slightly higher than the previous day's 1.3948. Lastly, the dollar was exchanged for 9.4173 Swedish krona, up from the previous day's 9.3744.

data.title: Security emergency: Pepe website hijacked by Inferno Drainer malware
data.description:
According to recent reports, the official website for the Pepe memecoin has been compromised in a front-end attack. Cybersecurity firm Blockaid detected the breach early, after which it put out an alert to the community informing them that the site had been injected with malicious code from the Inferno Drainer toolkit. The Inferno Drainer kit […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/pepe-hijacked-by-inferno-drainer-malware/

data.title: “First Time Ever”: CFTC Greenlights Spot Crypto Trading on Regulated U.S. Exchanges
data.description:

source: https://cryptonews.com/news/cftc-approves-spot-crypto-trading-us-exchanges/
